name: local_llm
description: 1.  Configuration: Open run_prompts.mjs and update the following variables at the top of the file to match your setup:     *   PROJECT_PATH: The absolute path to the code you want to analyze.     *   RESULTS_PATH: The absolute path where the results should be stored.     *   MODELS: The list of models to use.     *   PROMPTS: The list of prompts to run. 2.  Run the script: Execute the script from your terminal using Node.js:         `node run_prompts.mjs`
